home.subtitle: Paste your code and get detailed technical feedback: bugs, performance, and style. No API key. Your code is never executed.

noKey.title: No API key
noKey.description: The AI runs on a local server. No account or API key required.

private.title: Private by design
private.description: Your code is analyzed as data, never executed. Saved only if you sign in.

local.title: Local AI
local.description: Ollama runs on the server. No API costs. No third-party dependencies.

dashboard.title: My reviews
dashboard.subtitle: Code reviews you have submitted.
dashboard.empty: You have no saved reviews yet.
dashboard.signInPrompt: Sign in to view your review history.
dashboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this review?
dashboard.confirmDeleteMany: Are you sure you want to delete {count} reviews?

deleteModal.bodyOne: This will delete this saved review. This action cannot be undone.
deleteModal.bodyMany: This will delete {count} saved reviews. This action cannot be undone.

aiProvider.title: External AI provider
aiProvider.description: The app uses a free local AI server. No API key is needed to use the code reviewer.
aiProvider.note: Integration with external providers is planned for a future phase.

appTheme.title: Application theme
appTheme.label: Theme
appTheme.description: Choose how you want to view the application.

appTheme.title: Application theme
appTheme.label: Theme
appTheme.description: Choose how you want to view the application.

toast.reviewStarted: The review is being generated. You can keep browsing.

page.title: Code Review
page.subtitle: Paste your code, choose a review type, and get educational feedback.

form.codePlaceholder: Paste the code you want reviewed here...
form.trustNotice: Your code is analyzed as data and never executed. It is only saved if you are signed in.
form.saveHint: Want to save this review? Sign in to keep your history.

error.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.providerBusy: The system is processing another review. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
error.providerTimeout: The review took too long. Please try again.
error.providerUnavailable: The review service is currently unavailable. Please try again shortly.

clearModal.title: Clear code
clearModal.description: This will remove the current code from the editor. You can still paste or load another sample afterwards.

limitModal.title: Saved reviews limit reached
limitModal.description: You have {current}/{max} saved reviews. This review will not be saved unless you delete an existing one first.

review.notSaved: This review was not saved — you have reached your {max}-review limit. Go to your dashboard to delete a review and free up space.
